artifacts.name: Potion of Healing
artifacts.description: A red glimmering potion that restores 2d4+2 hit points when consumed. The liquid shimmers when moved.

artifacts.name: Potion of Climbing
artifacts.description: Grants a climbing speed equal to walking speed for 1 hour and advantage on Athletics checks to climb. The liquid forms layered stone-like bands.

artifacts.name: Bag of Holding
artifacts.description: A small bag with a magically expanded interior capable of holding up to 500 pounds or 64 cubic feet. Overloading or damaging it destroys the bag and ejects contents into the Astral Plane.

artifacts.name: Sending Stones
artifacts.description: A paired set of stones that allow the user to cast a once-per-day sending spell to the bearer of the matching stone.

artifacts.name: Immovable Rod
artifacts.description: A metal rod that becomes fixed in place when its button is pressed, supporting up to 8,000 pounds until deactivated.
